channel.title: GitHub Unknown languages Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Unknown languages in GitHub

item.title: pluja/awesome-privacy
item.description: Awesome Privacy - A curated list of services and alternatives that respect your privacy because PRIVACY MATTERS.

item.title: enescingoz/awesome-n8n-templates
item.description: Supercharge your workflow automation with this curated collection of n8n templates! Instantly connect your favorite apps-like Gmail, Telegram, Google Drive, Slack, and more-with ready-to-use, AI-powered automations. Save time, boost productivity, and unlock the true potential of n8n in just a few clicks.

item.title: fastfire/deepdarkCTI
item.description: Collection of Cyber Threat Intelligence sources from the deep and dark web

item.title: skills/introduction-to-github
item.description: Get started using GitHub in less than an hour.

item.title: n8n-io/self-hosted-ai-starter-kit
item.description: The Self-hosted AI Starter Kit is an open-source template that quickly sets up a local AI environment. Curated by n8n, it provides essential tools for creating secure, self-hosted AI workflows.

item.title: x1xhlol/system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description: FULL v0, Cursor, Manus, Augment Code, Same.dev, Lovable, Devin, Replit Agent, Windsurf Agent, VSCode Agent, Dia Browser, Xcode, Trae AI, Cluely & Orchids.app (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Tools & AI Models.

item.title: rothgar/awesome-tuis
item.description: List of projects that provide terminal user interfaces

item.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases
item.description: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

item.title: TheGP/untidetect-tools
item.description: List of anti-detect and humanizing tools and browsers, including captcha solvers and sms-activation.

item.title: farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
item.description: This repository contains a 90-day cybersecurity study plan, along with resources and materials for learning various cybersecurity concepts and technologies. The plan is organized into daily tasks, covering topics such as Network+, Security+, Linux, Python, Traffic Analysis, Git, ELK, AWS, Azure, and Hacking. The repository also includes a `LEARN.md
